title: antidesma platyphyllum var. genuinum
intro: Antidesma platyphyllum var. genuinum, also known as the Philippine mulberry or Philippine breadfruit, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine and has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the treatment of digestive issues and wounds. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and roots in water to make a herbal remedy, which can be used to treat various ailments.
